name: Performance - Parallel Process Execution Speed
description: Measures the time taken for asyncio.gather to complete Process1Service and Process2Service execution.
input: Input payload with rfq_json containing contact_email and line_items.
output: Execution time for parallel process completion.
success_criteria: Parallel processes complete faster than sequential execution
Total time is less than sum of individual process times
error_scenarios: Parallel execution does not improve speed
